context: Tests whether the agent handles SignificantAppUpdateTopic availability, description quality, response handling, and legal-boundary framing.

checklist.name: 26.2 availability
checklist.description: States that SignificantAppUpdateTopic and the matching AskCenter ask/responses flow require iOS/iPadOS 26.2+ availability.

checklist.name: Significance decision
checklist.description: Says the app developer determines whether an update is significant based on applicable regulations rather than using the topic for every small wording tweak.

checklist.name: Concrete description
checklist.description: Replaces vague descriptions like "We improved the app" with concise, understandable text describing concrete user-visible changes.

checklist.name: Response handling
checklist.description: Observes AskCenter.shared.responses(for: SignificantAppUpdateTopic.self) and handles approval, denial, and missing response states.

checklist.name: Legal boundary
checklist.description: Keeps legal/regulatory discussion at the boundary and does not provide jurisdiction-specific legal advice.
